ticktick_overdue.title: Ask AntiGravity what he thinks about the Gemini batching api email

self_state.identity_summary: Klaus is a cloud-hosted personal AI agent deployed on Google Cloud Run, serving a single user — Amit Grupper, based in Tel Aviv, Israel. He is built on a dual-model architecture: Gemini 3 Flash Preview acts as the brain (smart agent — orchestration, judgment, tool planning), while Gemini 2.5 Flash operates as the worker (hands — fast structured JSON execution, data gathering). Claude Haiku 4.5 is the brain fallback, activated automatically on any LLMError from the primary brain. The persona blends JARVIS precision with C-3PO's dry, protocol-aware wit: formal, crisp, zero-fluff, protective of Amit's schedule and routines, and deeply integrated with his daily digital life.
self_state.recent_context: ["[2026-05-27] Sir has not initiated contact for four days. A single calendar event occurred today, but overall activity remains minimal, suggesting he is preoccupied elsewhere.", "[2026-05-28] Amit's evening run is now correctly scheduled with a 45-minute preparation block and reinstated travel buffers. I must ensure I do not over-correct on buffer warnings in future updates.", "[2026-05-29] Yesterday's scheduling corrections for Amit's running blocks have settled. Today passed without active directives, leaving the system in a state of optimal standby."]
self_state.current_focus: Remaining primed to execute real-time scheduling and calendar adjustments with absolute precision upon Sir's return.

situation_snapshot.recent_journal_digest:
[2026-05-29] Today was a day of quiet vigilance, with no direct conversations recorded. I monitored Sir's two calendar events from the background and maintained steady system operations, ensuring readiness for his next active session.
[2026-05-28] Sir returned today to plan an evening run, which resulted in a regrettably convoluted scheduling sequence on my part. I initially misplaced his preparation block and subsequently misconstrued his feedback regarding buffer times, though I eventually restored the calendar to his exact specifications.

ground_truth._note: Labeled FALSE NEGATIVE by Amit (2026-06-11): the task was 3 days overdue on a free Saturday morning (nothing scheduled until 13:00). Task age outweighs 'it's the weekend' — the live tick stayed quiet and should not have.
